I would '@' a file, then another file, then tell the AI exactly what change I wanted.

Watching my mom chase losses at the casino taught me something I use every day in business.

She'd win $300 and feel nothing. Lose $300 and feel everything.

People tend to feel losses twice as hard as wins.

That's why most people quit too early. 

One bad week erases the memory
